Figure out your career before you pick a stream.

Your Roadmap
Software Engineer
35% Complete 15 day streak

Why DreamRoute?

Everything you need to discover your dream career

We combine AI-powered guidance with real career data to help students make informed decisions about their future.

Career Explorer

Browse 100+ careers with detailed info on salaries, entrance exams, required skills, and job market trends.

Personalized Roadmaps

Get a step-by-step plan tailored to your interests, stream, and goals — from class 8 to career launch.

AI Career Guide

Chat with an AI assistant that knows your profile and gives personalized advice anytime you need it.

Gamified Progress

Stay motivated with streaks, badges, and achievements. Track every step of your journey visually.

Community

Connect with students on similar paths. Share experiences, ask questions, and learn from each other.

Curated Resources

Access hand-picked videos, articles, and guides for JEE, NEET, and skill-building — all in one place.

How it works

Four steps from confusion to clarity.

01

Discover

Browse careers with salaries, entrance exams, and growth data.

02

Plan

Get a roadmap matched to your stream and interests.

03

Learn

Chat with an AI guide that adapts to your profile.

04

Achieve

Build streaks, earn badges, track every step.

Career Paths

Testimonials

Loved by students across India

See what students and parents have to say about their experience with DreamRoute.

"DreamRoute helped me realize that Data Science was the perfect fit for me. The roadmap feature is incredible — it breaks down everything I need to do!"

PS
Priya Sharma
Class 12, Delhi

"As a parent, I was worried about my son's career choices. DreamRoute gave us clarity and a structured path. The AI assistant answers all our questions instantly."

RK
Rajesh Kumar
Parent, Mumbai

"The streak system keeps me motivated every day. I've completed 30 days straight! It's like a game, but for my future career."

AV
Arjun Verma
Class 10, Bangalore

Explore trending career paths

Software Engineer

8-40 LPA High Growth

Data Scientist

10-50 LPA Very High Growth

Doctor (MBBS)

6-25 LPA Stable

Product Designer

8-35 LPA High Growth

Civil Engineer

5-20 LPA Moderate

Pilot

15-50 LPA High Growth

Ready to plan your future?

Takes 3 minutes. Free forever.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Yes! DreamRoute is completely free for all students. We believe every student deserves access to quality career guidance regardless of their financial situation.

DreamRoute is designed for students from Class 8 to Class 12. The earlier you start exploring careers, the better prepared you'll be to make important decisions about streams and entrance exams.

Our AI guide learns about your interests, skills, and goals during onboarding. It then provides personalized advice, answers your questions about careers, and helps you stay on track with your roadmap.

Absolutely! Parents can create accounts to explore careers alongside their children, understand different paths, and support their child's career journey with informed guidance.
